title: India’s Cockroach party protesters to defy police and march to parliament

content:

title: South East Water announces new hosepipe ban for Sussex, Surrey, Hampshire and Berkshire
description: South East Water has announced a hosepipe ban for Sussex, Surrey, Hampshire and Berkshire.
content:
Why is there a hosepipe ban?
South East Water (SEW) said it had to bring in the hosepipe ban to protect some groundwater sources because river levels had declined.
This was due to lower than average rainfall, continued hot weather and high demand, th... [1422 chars]

title: Burnham is fifth PM in four years
description: Determined to hit the ground running, the former mayor hopes to maintain the leadership style he adopted in Manchester.
content:
By lunchtime today, the UK will have its fifth prime minister in four years.
No other sentence can so pithily summarise the nature of British politics right now than that one.

title: My fitness tracker knew I was pregnant before I did
description: Ravika is one of hundreds of women who are noticing early pregnancy signs through the data on their fitness trackers.
content:
Ravika was celebrating her birthday on holiday with her husband when she got an unusual alert from her fitness tracker.
